data.body:
Implemented all 3 stories, committed as a 3-commit stack on worktree-loft-teeth-zip (each with Change-Id + rebar-ticket trailer, all pre-commit gates green):
- S1 (2ee4): ADR 0030 + grounding.md pointer + sibling IaC epic a374 (yaw-quota-wraith). docs-only.
- S2 (40b8): semantic.py refute_semantic dispatch + 3 config keys + oracle escalation + backend availability. default-off, 20 tests.
- S3 (8451): pyright_backend.py confirm-only diagnostics resolver + grounding-t2 extra + docs T2 section + 14-test fail-open matrix.
Full grounding suite 236 passed; lint+typecheck clean. Blocker: completion-verifier close gate is agentic and hitting API 429 rate-limits (fail-closed). Retrying closes spaced out. Then push stack to gerrit feature/grounding-t2 and merge-back to main.
